lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and minor dings. The interior shows moderate wear, including some staining on the upholstery. All major mechanical systems are currently operational, though the car will require routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and some minor dents. The interior shows visible wear and tear from regular use.

Looking for a reliable ride that's ready to get you where you need to go? This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a fantastic value for anyone needing a solid daily driver! While it shows some expected wear and tear from its time on the road, it remains a dependable choice that still has plenty of life left in it. Perfect for a first car or a budget-friendly commuter!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as-is. While it remains functional and reliable for daily use, it does show visible signs of its age and mileage. The exterior features several noticeable scratches and a few small dents, and the clear coat is beginning to thin in some areas. Inside, the cabin shows significant wear on the seats and some staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car is operational, though a potential buyer should expect to perform some routine maintenance and address minor repairs in the near future to ensure long-term reliability.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering a reliable driving experience for someone who values mechanical function over cosmetic appearance. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, some paint fading on the hood, and a small dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery shows moderate wear and a few minor stains, though all electronics and climate controls remain fully operational. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though it will likely need new tires within the next few thousand miles. It is a solid, honest workhorse that has been maintained regularly but reflects the typical wear of a well-used vehicle.

Presented in peerless condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and housed in a climate-controlled environment, every surface reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom delivery. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a connoisseur-grade example that defies its age, offering an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical experience for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of excellence.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and sparkling clean. It drives like an absolute dream and is just waiting for someone new to love it as much as I have. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe how perfect it is!

This collector-grade specimen features a mid-mounted 3.4L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power delivery through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. Mechanical integrity is absolute; the valvetrain is silent, and the rear main seal remains bone-dry. Equipped with a factory-optioned limited-slip differential and PASM active damping, the chassis dynamics are razor-sharp
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history.

This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to the interior upholstery or exterior finish. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new machine, having undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for excellence. Hey guys! 🚗✨ I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still has that fresh showroom feel. It’s seriously flawless inside and out, and it drives like a total dream. You really have to see it to believe how clean it is! Come grab this gem before someone else does! 🙌

This is a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) presented in showroom-mint condition. Under the hood lies the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for surgical throttle response. Power is managed via a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and delivered through a variable M differential lock. This specimen has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including subframe reinforcement and a full VANOS overhaul to ensure mechanical longevity. The chassis dynamics remain razor-sharp, supported by original-spec bushings and dampeners. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, while the mechanical systems operate with the same clockwork precision as they did on the assembly line. A truly turn-key example for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Used car. Mint condition. Showroom quality. No defects. Garage kept. Ready for immediate sale.

This pristine vehicle is the definition of showroom quality, having been meticulously maintained with an obsessive attention to detail. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like factory finish entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin retains its original 'new car' scent, with the premium leather upholstery showing no signs of wear, creasing, or fading. Every technological feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the advanced driver-assist suite, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively garage-kept and serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule at authorized dealerships, with all documentation provided. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just left the dealership, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction, preserved in pristine, showroom-quality condition. This vehicle has been curated for the most discerning client, featuring an immaculate exterior and a meticulously maintained interior that reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every component operates with mechanical precision, ensuring an ownership experience that aligns with the highest tier of automotive excellence. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that stands as a testament to uncompromising quality.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in true showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and garage-kept under a breathable cover, the exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with a professional ceramic coating and absolutely zero imperfections—no rock chips, swirls, or dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, the original floor mats are pristine, and every technological feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records organized in a comprehensive binder. It drives as tightly as the day it left the assembly line, with a smooth, responsive power delivery and a whisper-quiet cabin. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Pristine interior. Low mileage. Title in hand.

Presented in showroom condition, this 2017 Porsche 718 Cayman S is a true collector’s specimen. Finished in striking Guards Red, the paint depth is exceptional thanks to a professional multi-stage polish and high-grade ceramic coating; there are zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections to be found. The 20-inch Carrera S wheels are entirely free of curb rash and are wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. Inside, the black leather interior remains in 'as-new' condition—the seat bolsters show no signs of compression or wear, the dashboard is free of sun exposure, and the original protective films are still present on several interior components. Mechanically, the car is faultless. It has been strictly garage-kept under a climate-controlled cover and serviced exclusively at Porsche authorized centers, with a complete binder of service records provided. With only 8,400 miles, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a driving experience and aesthetic presence indistinguishable from the day it left the factory.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and demonstrating an impeccable standard of care. The exterior retains its original luster, entirely free of imperfections, while the interior remains in a state of absolute refinement. Mechanically, this automobile performs with the precision and reliability expected of a flagship model. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a meticulously maintained example that satisfies the most exacting standards of excellence.
